programme.desc: The format of this season is different from the previous three seasons. A total of 12 to 15 singers are invited to serve as music partners, and they will sing in pairs on their own. programme.title: The Passbook - EP 4

In the midst of her terror and desperation, the calm and protective Dion (Sandy Pradana) steps into her life, serving as her ultimate anchor and protector.

programme.title: Dunia Tipu Tipu, Ujungnya Tetep I Lop U
programme.desc: The story tells of Acha and Daffa's pre-wedding event suddenly failed because Daffa already had another girlfriend. Then, at the suggestion of her sister, Acha finally went ahead with the pre-wedding event with another man named Mamat. Mamat was given a makeover, like a foreigner who had just arrived in Indonesia. Although it was all a ruse, it managed to annoy Daffa. So, will Mamat's disguise be exposed?

programme.desc: Viona is being forced by her father to get married soon, for the sake of her family's business. Meanwhile, Viona is heartbroken. Suddenly, Viona remembers Bagas, the man who once hit her car. Bagas is a kind person and one of the administrators at the Cahaya Shelter.

programme.title: Tukar Nasib Kok Jadi Makin Asik
programme.desc: Nila and Fira are sisters. Nila and Fira's personalities are very different. Nila is a beautiful and fashionable girl, Nila is also liked by many men at her school. In contrast to Fira who appears simple and ordinary. However, Fira is a chef at a restaurant. One time, Fira and Nila were involved in an argument in the car and finally the car they were riding in was hit by a tree, Nila and Fira were admitted to the hospital and it seemed that Nila and Fira's bodies had been swapped.

programme.desc: Ryan is furious when the feisty Dinar mistakes him for a humble motorcycle taxi driver. However, their chaotic and explosive first encounter sets off an unexpected chain of events that accidentally drags them straight to the altar.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 217
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Tutor Dapat Restu Mami Pliss
programme.desc: While most kids are proud of having a beautiful mother, Maura (Flavio Zaviera) finds it exhausting because her gorgeous mom, Mili, always steals the spotlight. To make matters worse, Maura is socially awkward around guys-getting tongue-tied around ordinary boys and completely freezing near handsome ones. Consequently, whenever the charming Arsena (Fattah Syah) visits, Maura puts up a cold, grumpy front out of pure panic, often running away mid-conversation

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 19
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 165
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 19

During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 165
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mundur Wir, Aku Jadian Sama Bodyguardku
programme.desc: After Rindu (Rayna Snova) courageously foils a robbery and saves Arga, a grateful Arga wants to hire her as his personal bodyguard. However, Arga's girlfriend has already hired a tough professional named Rendy (Jeff Smith) for the job. To settle who is worthy, the young girl and Rendy face off in an intense duel. Impressed by their fierce combat skills, Arga makes a bold decision: he hires both of them to protect him

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 217
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jagain Jodoh Orang Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Feni (Larasati Nugroho) is deeply in love with Madun (Hardi Fadhillah), but their romance hits a wall due to her mother's disapproval. Working as a humble motorcycle taxi (ojek) driver with a meager income, Madun is banned from seeing Feni until he strikes it rich. Under family pressure, Feni tries to break things off to find a wealthy suitor in the city, but a stubborn Madun refuses to let her go without a fight.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 19
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Biarin Gombal Yang Penting Manisnya Pas
programme.desc: Nita (Amanda Salmakhira) faces relentless bullying from her college peers, especially Sarah, because of her weight. However, Arya (Ridho Illahi), a handsome assistant lecturer, constantly steps in to protect and defend her. Deep down, Nita reminds Arya of his long-lost childhood friend, Tata, driving him on a mission to uncover if Nita is the girl he has been searching for all these years

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 166
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ABANG KEMBANG DIUBER MANTAN
programme.desc: A bizarre flower garland carried by Arhan turns out to be an unexpected blessing in disguise. Despite its strange contents and the endless, chaotic twists of fate it causes, the quirky arrangement ultimately leads Arhan straight to his true soulmate

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 218
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biarin Aja Aku Cinta Kamu Selama Gak Makan Ternak Warga
programme.desc: Determined to escape an arranged marriage orchestrated by her father, Winda (Shanice Margaretha) flees her home. During her frantic escape, her car accidentally hits Timmy, a prized goat belonging to Ikbal (Kevin Hillers). Horrified by the accident, Winda takes full responsibility and joins Ikbal’s group, promising to care for the injured goat while hiding from her past

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 20

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 167

programme.title: ABANG LAYANG LAYANG GAMONIN AYANG
programme.desc: The never-ending feud between Hardi Fadhillah and Josephine Firmstone shows no signs of slowing down. Hardi, a passionate kite chaser, constantly clashes with Josephine, a local kite vendor. While Hardi just wants to indulge in his favorite hobby, Josephine is constantly terrified that his reckless running will drive away her customers and ruin her displays

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 219
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kabarnya Sampai Saat Ini Mereka Masih Saling Sayang
programme.desc: Rahayu's (Rachquel Nesia) desperate prayers are answered instantly when Nando (Ikbal Fauzi), a wealthy tycoon, suddenly appears and offers to marry her on the spot. Shocked by this sudden stroke of luck, Rahayu becomes deeply suspicious, convinced that Nando is pulling an elaborate scam on her.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 21
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 167
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ABANG LAYANG LAYANG GAMONIN AYANG

Hardi, a passionate kite chaser, constantly clashes with Josephine, a local kite vendor. While Hardi just wants to indulge in his favorite hobby, Josephine is constantly terrified that his reckless running will drive away her customers and ruin her displays

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 44
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 12
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 22
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 3
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 1
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 14
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 6
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 12
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 9
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 6
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Elak - Elak.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Opera Zero - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan yang memaparkan Zero sebagai sebuah kumpulan lawak di atas satu pentas.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Dik? - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 45
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 10
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Kuntom
programme.desc: Kuntom, gadis kampung yang berhijrah ke Kuala Lumpur untuk membuka sebuah kedai hijab. Dia terpaksa bersaing dengan Faris, tuan gedung besar di depan kedainya.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 2
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 12
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia - EP 9
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 2
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 7
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Klik Riders - EP 23
programme.desc: Rancangan hiburan untuk seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Roy Azman, Syafa, & Haiqal, berentap sesama sendiri untuk mendapatkan hadiah lumayan dengan syarat, perlu bermain & meneka samada berat, tinggi, panjang, & harga objek di hadapan mereka

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong ? - EP 5
programme.desc: Panel selebriti memilih jawapan berdasarkan kenyataan dan cerita yang mungkin benar atau tidak, 2 kumpulan berentap untuk perolehi markah tertinggi.

programme.title: Ini Malam Kita Punya - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan bual bicara yang akan di hoskan oleh Nabil Ahmad yang akan mengetengahkan sketch lawak dan temu bual bersama artis-artis terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Panel Skandal - EP 5
programme.desc: Panel skandal sebuah rancangan berpanel wawancara temubual santai berkenaan isu-isu semasa yang hangat seperti contoh isi viral/gosip/skandal yang dikupas oleh panel pelawak-pelawak dan panel jemputan.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.desc: Thrown out by her own family, a young woman finds support from a loyal ally, forming a bond that survives repeated hardships and unexpected twists of fate.

programme.title: Pandian Stores Thanthai Sol Mikka Mandhi - EP 798
programme.desc: Pandian's life is centered around his large, close-knit family. But when his children get involved with dangerous rivals, will their strong family bonds survive the challenges?

programme.title: Ayyanar Thunai - EP 420
programme.desc: In a bid to escape her ill-fate, Nila becomes the daughter-in-law of a family with a tainted past. Can she restore their lost hope, or will it shatter hers?

programme.title: Siragadikka Aasai - EP 1025
programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.title: Chinna Marumagal Panirendaam Vaguppu - EP 630
programme.desc: Teen girls' medical dreams are dashed by forced marriage to a patriarchal family. She struggles to adapt while clinging to her aspirations.

programme.title: Kana Kandenadi - EP 107
programme.desc: Set against water scarcity, this film follows three people: Baskar, a desalination hopeful; Archana, his wife; Madan, an influencer. Together they triumph through clever plans.

programme.title: Sindhu Bairavi Kacheri Arambam - EP 361
programme.desc: For her father's word, Bairavi ties the knot with Arumugam, while Siva rejects Sindhu's proposal yet ends up marrying her. How will these couples find solace?

programme.title: Mahanadhi Sagodharigalin Kadhai - EP 867
programme.desc: When a family loses their father, the sole member of their lives, they take it as a challenge to rise back stronger in all situations.

programme.title: Kanmani Anbudan - EP 525
programme.desc: Kanmani, a talented chef, falls for Anbu, heir to Raj Foods, while her actress friend Vennila also catches his eye. After an unexpected marriage, will Anbu accept Kanmani as his wife?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu - EP 293
programme.desc: Ilamathi is stuck between a brave cop and a bad goon. This love triangle is dangerous. Can her heart handle the trouble? She must choose between the two men.

programme.title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare - Oru Chinanjiru Kuyilin Kadhai - EP 130
programme.desc: A poetic drama about love, memory, and childhood emotions as characters grow. Simple moments reveal how love shapes memory, guiding growth through tender, evolving feelings.

programme.title: Azhagae Azhagu - EP 98

programme.title: L'ocean Vu Du Coeur
programme.desc: Surrounded by experts, scientists, explorers, or simple fishermen, the astrophysicist and ecologist Hubert Reeves, who passed away in 2023, proposes to identify what threatens the ocean today and exposes the latest discoveries on the intelligence of animals and ocean ecosystems.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 1
programme.desc: Henri and Myrlande, Quebeckers of Haitian origin and parents of three children, see themselves offered new career prospect. But will they be brave enough to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 2
programme.desc: Myrlande, who has to defend a member of the local mafia, decides to delay announcing her career change when Father Moses invites her to be the honorary sponsor of the local community fair.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 3
programme.desc: Myrlande tries to persuade her parents and parents-in-law to accept her career change, but for them anything new is always a bit of a shock.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 4
programme.desc: Henri and Myrlande have fallen out with the former even going as far as to avoid his wife. He holds it against her that she hid the identity of her new boss from him.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 32
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Just Kids
programme.desc: Jack, 19; Lisa, 17, and 10 year-old Mathis, suddenly find themselves orphaned. Whilst Lisa distances herself from the other two, Jack is made Mathis' guardian. A new life begins... But how to assume the responsibility of bringing up a child when you are hardly more than a teenager yourself?

programme.title: Temps De Chien
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau - EP 28
programme.desc: After many years without contact, talented blacksmith Florence Rougier crosses paths again with her adoptive brother, Olivier Garcin. When he is found murdered, Marleau looks into their strange family history. Faced with investigators, Florence's relatives remain united and uncooperative.

programme.title: Naestro, De La Rue A L'opera
programme.desc: Nabil Rachdi, known as Naestro, grew up near Marseille. Passionate about boxing, karate and MMA, his life took a different turn when he was arrested for drug trafficking. In prison, he had a revelation: he discovered his tenor voice and began listening to opera. He would become a singer.

programme.title: Hip-Hop A Quebec... La Voi(X/E) D'une Communaute
programme.desc: In the Quebec region, the birthplace of ''queb rap'', the history of hip-hop is about the emergence of a long sidelined community. A look back at the journey of young people who found a culture they could identify with and have taken to industrial level, not without confrontation and rivalry.

programme.title: Movie - Thavasi
programme.desc: Thavasi and Sankarapandi are sworn enemies. A young man, Thangarasu, commits suicide when wrongly accused by Thavasi for stealing. Why does Thavasi send his son to live in Thangarasu's house?

programme.title: Movie - Thambikku Intha Ooru
programme.desc: Akil, a rich youth, runs a restaurant in partnership with his friend Cola Kumar in Singapore. One day, he discovers that he is an orphan and thus embarks on a journey to find his biological parents.

programme.title: Movie - Neruppukul Eeram
programme.desc: Police officer Karthik is hell-bent on putting Baba, a local goon, behind bars. However, Karthik's fiancee Radha requests him to forgive Baba by giving him a chance to reform.

programme.title: Movie - Nilaa Kaalam
programme.desc: Nila's mother, an actress, is separated from her husband. Nila has all the comforts but no friends. She befriends two boys who work in a garage. They plan a picnic that may change everything, forever.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kaalamellam Kaathiruppen
programme.desc: Rich boy Kannan hears Manimekalai sing in a temple and falls in love with her. But when all his attempts to befriend her only earn her wrath, he has to find a new way to impress her.

programme.title: Movie - Mirugam
programme.desc: Ayyanar is a womanising, savage man who beats up innocents and rapes women. He marries the pretty Alagamma who first hates him but later decides to transform him. However, his sinful past soon catches up.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Thambi Periya Thambi
programme.desc: Two illiterate brothers try hard to win the love of a girl whose parents died in an accident. They have to protect her from a wealthy man and his son who have their lecherous eyes on her.

programme.title: Movie - Sippikkul Muthu
programme.desc: Sivayya, a person with autism, lives in a village with his grandmother. Things take a turn when he marries a widow, Lalitha, in order to save her from the atrocities of widowhood.

programme.title: Movie - Velaiyilla Pattathari 2
programme.desc: When Raghuvaran, a civil engineer, declines a job offer from businesswoman Vasundhara, she makes it her mission to trouble him.

programme.title: Movie - Paarvai Ondre Pothume
programme.desc: Manoj becomes a successful hotelier through his hard work and helps his best friend, Vinod, by giving him a job. Their friendship is put to the test when both of them fall in love with Neetha.

programme.title: Movie - Nimidangal
programme.desc: A man manages to find a job in the city. There, he befriends a young girl and finds love. Things change after he falls into the trap of a blackmailer.

programme.title: Movie - Ninaithaley
programme.desc: Rupa, an orphan, is dismayed when her marriage is called off on her wedding day. Anand, who comes to attend her wedding, falls for her. Will Rupa give relationship a second chance?

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Little John
programme.desc: To please his girlfriend's parents, John seeks the help of a god-man to make him invisible, but unfortunately he shrinks in size. To return to his normal state, he must procure a magic ring.

programme.title: Movie - Sondhakaran
programme.desc: A vengeful criminal frames a policeman for sexual assault. After serving his sentence, he starts working as a watchman and saves the residents of a building from a fraudster who runs a chit fund.

programme.title: Movie - Vinnukkum Mannukkum
programme.desc: A village leader is adored by the people. His brother returns to the village and wishes to marry the girl he dreams of. They learn that the girl is an actress and the elder brother approaches her with the proposal, but she refuses.

programme.title: Movie - Poomagal Oorvalam
programme.desc: Sarvanan, adopted by a childless couple, falls in love with Kavitha, the daughter of a caste-obsessed Sengodan. He tries to change Sengodan's attitude in order to marry Kavitha.

programme.title: Movie - Poove Unakkaga
programme.desc: Raja learns that the girl he loves is in love with another man. When he comes to know about the long-standing dispute between both their families, he goes to their village to unite them.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.desc: The Badminton Asia Championships is a tournament organized by governing body Badminton Asia to crown the best badminton players in Asia. programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: REVIEW - SUN 14 SEP
programme.desc: After the international break, Review is back with highlights from Matchweek 4, starting with Arsenal facing Nottingham Forest, Everton hosting Villa, and the Manchester derby as United take on City at the Etihad.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 24
programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Julia Stuart is joined by Ian Wright, Kolo Toure & Mikel John Obi to discuss the influence of African football on the Premier League.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Roberto Duran vs. Sean Fitzgerald
programme.desc: One of the greatest fighters of all time, Boxing Hall of Famer Roberto Duran, continues his comeback against Worcester, Massachusetts native Sean Fitzgerald. He would get more than he bargained for against the young undefeated Fitzgerald, who gave Duran a more competitive fight than anyone could have expected.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Tbilisi, Georgia, where judo is one of the most popular sports in the country.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: This episode features a Light Heavyweight superfight billed as "Battle of the Superpowers" between an unbeaten Joe Calzaghe in what would be his last professional fight battling with former champ Roy Jones, Jr., as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.desc: Episode 3: Tokyo, Japan - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kyokushin Karate and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Breaking featuring Masters Shihan Yuzo Goda and Shihan Isamu Fukuda.

programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14

Along the way, Andy comes face to face with a tree snake and some hungry wild pigs.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 52
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true? The first problem to fix is Mole's eyesight. Happy thinks he needs glasses, but Mole explains he can't wear them for stunts as they keep falling off his nose. Luckily Duggee has his Glasses Badge, so he has an idea how they can fix them.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Glitch fills Cheddar Gorge with a river of melted cheese, turning it into a giant cheese fondue. Can the Go Jetters rescue the tourists and sheep from the cheesiest glitch ever?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Glitch's plans to open a hotel on an unspoilt beach in Thailand go horribly wrong when a group of macaque monkeys steal his Grim-o-freeze gun.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 3
programme.desc: Toby's passengers can't stop making fun of him, that is until he discovers two villains trying to steal King Godred's crown.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck help the baker bake Shoku-pan, a light and fluffy type of Japanese bread.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Rainbow gets to experience the night for the first time.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Kisses, cuddles, and making renewable energy from cow poo! Parents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran go ice-skating. While Gran Gran is a little nervous, JoJo is a natural. With Jared's help Gran Gran soon gets the hang of it!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.desc: When Glitch heads to Grim HQ to make amends after an argument, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped as Glitch heads to the most remote place on earth: Point Nemo, in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Evil Pea and the Mini Peas take over the Tato Tower HQ and lock Supertato out.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli's heat helps Supertato to stop Evil Pea from freezing over the whole supermarket.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 62
programme.desc: When it's time for the Tubby Custard Ride, there's a special trailer the Teletubbies haven't seen before. It's for The Noo-­Noo who gets to go on a special Tubby Custard Ride.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'treasure' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we find lots of different treasure - gold treasure, royal treasure, sunken treasure, jungle treasure and even yummy treat treasure! Dee and a friend have a go at juggling treasure and we see Dee hide some treasure.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: A copycat space seed crash lands on Farmer Fuddles's farm, and Messy is keen to help. It soon grows into... Messy! Can there ever be such a thing as too much Messy? OKIDO is about to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 33
programme.desc: Ted the bus wants to be faster, and Mojo swops every top to try to make it happen. But it's Bo's homemade rocket that gives Ted the boost he needs... all the way into space!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 18

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 14

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal - who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 20

While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.desc: Ashley and Anna try to knock Troy off his throne in his own back yard. Daniel's strategy falls to pieces. Leron and Porkchop call in reinforcements. Troy and Pickle risk their lives to hunt in Deadwood.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 2
programme.desc: Facing soaring costs, mounting criticism, and a tight deadline, Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 6
programme.desc: After the attack on Pearl Harbor, Japanese forces sweep across Southeast Asia. On Guadalcanal, United States Marines are given the bloody task of stopping their relentless advance.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: The team thinks a 300-foot wreck off the tip of Florida just might be the Sudoffco-a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: The modern concept of 'extreme sports' is a product of marketing, but back in the old days, the rules of our nation's sports made them truly extreme. From bone-crushing football to deadly baseball games.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 5
programme.desc: The story of how America's battle to control the seas against the terrifying German U-boats in the Atlantic and Japan's fearsome Navy in the Pacific ultimately turns the tide of the war.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Discover a forgotten POW-turned-refugee camp, Chiang Kai-shek's secret military command centre and an extensive underground city.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 8
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 9
programme.desc: Midway through gator season, hunters aim to settle old scores. Willie chases a nasty gator called Renegade, who lives up to his name. Ronnie pulls double duty when Timmy arrives with his arm in a sling.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: A blind man who uses bat-like powers of echolocation to navigate his surroundings? A samurai with reflexes faster than a speeding bullet? A man who's immune to electrocution?

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 16
programme.desc: New pathways discovered in the swamp suggest new activity. And after professional analysis, a gemstone uncovered on Lot 5 has the team believing that someone with great wealth was on the island before.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: When is Mission: Impossible more than just a movie? Newly uncensored evidence will reveal the lengths that the few and the elite have gone to within the hostile lands, all to complete the mission.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 4
programme.desc: Lauro hunts caribou in whiteout conditions on Alaska's North Slope; Bret and Ivy, buried under heavy snowfall, push to set their 230-mile trapline; Daniel launches from his floating cabin to hunt deer.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5) - EP 2
programme.desc: When a mother learns her daughter has been abused by the teenager's estranged father, the police are called. But, before the investigation can gather speed, the father visits unexpectedly.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14) - EP 1
programme.desc: Marjorie has collected items from thrift stores and estate sales over the years for various projects, which has led to a massive amount of clutter in her home, making living in the space very difficult.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: In 2006, Ken Juedes was found dead by his wife, Cindy Shulz-Juedes. For 13 years the case went cold until investigators linked her to the murder.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 2
programme.desc: The community of Macon, GA, is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex. Nobody knows where she could be or what could have happened.

programme.title: Al Maunah: The Malaysian Arms Heist
programme.desc: The largest arms heist in Malaysian history soon turns into a 5-day hostage stand-off when Special Branch officers sent to investigate are captured, tortured and killed.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 2

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 3

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 4
programme.desc: When a mother of three is found lying unconscious beneath her open, second-story window, Medical Examiner Dr. Dragovic suspects there is more than meets the eye.

programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place. They end their time in the Big Apple by serving up food for the suits on Wall Street from a pizza van.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to Copenhagen to work at Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens. Giles learns to be the brake man on one of the world's oldest wooden rollercoasters, while Monica changes lightbulbs on the ornate Moroccan inspired facade and dives to clean an vast tropical aquarium. Giles learns how to get a table at one of the city's most avant-garde restaurants, and Monica dresses in horror makeup to give Giles the pleasure of being terrified.

programme.title: The Great South African Bake Off S04 - EP 10
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their last challenge of the season they have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Greek Job S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan face the daunting task of transforming the main ground floor room, which resembles a dreary barn, into a Greek-chic living and dining area.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to Copenhagen to work at Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens. Giles learns to be the brake man on one of the world's oldest wooden rollercoasters, while Monica changes lightbulbs on the ornate Moroccan inspired facade and dives to clean an vast tropical aquarium. Giles learns how to get a table at one of the city's most avant-garde restaurants, and Monica dresses in horror makeup to give Giles the pleasure of being terrified.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place. They end their time in the Big Apple by serving up food for the suits on Wall Street from a pizza van.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Greek Job S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Inspired by Gerald Durrell's love of wildlife, Amanda and Alan design their first ever children's bedroom and visit Gerald's widow Lee for inspiration.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Greek Job S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan show some love to the heart of the home, the kitchen. But with ivy growing out of the windows and a roof on the verge of collapse, it's not an easy ride.

programme.title: The Great South African Bake Off S04 - EP 10
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their last challenge of the season they have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to Copenhagen to work at Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens. programme.title: Rick Stein's Food Stories S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: In the West Country, Rick meets an organic food pioneer, Britain's most famous female cheese maker, and chef Mark Hix, the master of simple British food. Then, he cooks his own vegetarian dishes.

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain shows us how to create the perfect dishes to compliment any kind of day.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The overgrown patch of land on the side of the mountain has been untouched for more than a decade, and with no idea of what plants thrive in the Tuscan terrain, the best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price, who has spent over 30 years cultivating a 15-acre oasis.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city Florence, he's determined to have a mural, but Amanda fears his creative juices could turn into a flood. To nail his aesthetic, Alan travels to the outskirts of the Tuscan capital to meet Jane at her medieval home decorated in rare 14th-century frescos.

programme.title: Hemsley + Hemsley - Healthy and Delicious S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Healthy home cooks Jasmine and Melissa Hemsley create nutrient rich dishes that will warm you up on a cold day. From a buckwheat porridge with coconut to their signature health giving bone broth, the girls offer nutritionally high alternatives to the carbs we're often drawn to when it's chilly outside. A stunning slow cook chicken curry is topped with cauliflower rice for a warming supper and for pudding, a intriguing spicy ground almond apple crumble.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jamie gets frugal with leftovers as he makes spaghetti frittata, rustles up pork pies in the air fryer and whips up thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 5
programme.desc: Surrounded as far as they eye can see by vast sand dunes and scorching heat, guests relax in palatial comfort with swimming pools, huge baths and lush gardens. Giles and Monica explore how all this water use is made possible and meet the staff who are coping with living and providing hotel service in such an extreme environment.

programme.desc: In Lincolnshire, high-flyers Zara and Giuliano set out to build a 400-square-metre malthouse-inspired home, but run into problems from the get-go.

programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13) - EP 6
programme.desc: The remaining chefs are back with their first Mystery Box Challenge, apples! With both sweet and savoury flavours, the chef with immunity is tasked with assigning varieties of dish to each region.

programme.title: There's A New Killer In Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. The two become fast friends, but soon Holly, another of Alice's friends, suspects there is more to Ronnie than meets the eye.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: You may not know that you've been eating tonkatsu for years. Let Rachael reintroduce you to her version of the dish, also known as fried pork chops, served with an umami-rich sauce.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 27
programme.desc: Rachael loves gazpacho, a cold soup made from raw vegetables that is perfect for warm Italian summers. She's holding onto the sunshine with her delicious recipe for green tomato gazpacho.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 7
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 46
programme.desc: It's Finals Week, and the mystery boxes contain a golden ticket which will fast track the contestant with the top dish into the semi-final, while the others will have to battle it out in pressure test.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 13
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo takes us around the world to a restaurant with a bird's eye view of Singapore, as diners feast on fresh seafood fifty-seven storeys above the city.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Dee has the voice of an angel, but her huge neck hump has stolen her passion to sing. Young Eli wants to be a chef, but feels ashamed of his cheek bump and worries removing it could paralyse his face.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 6
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.desc: Rachael's friends Leida and Veina show how to make three types of Albanian pizza, a rustic dish made with phyllo dough filled with beef, chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: "Halftime Report" is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: "Halftime Report" is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 89
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 2
programme.desc: 23andMe Institute CEO Anne Wojcicki. Emily meets 23andMe Institute Chief Executive Officer Anne Wojcicki for a discussion of the rise, fall and rebirth of the personal genetics company.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his latest consumer hardware bet.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event. They discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: China's Plans for an Urban Super City
programme.desc: China’s Greater Bay Area will fuse 11 cities into a megalopolis that includes Hong Kong, which Beijing hopes will become a new Silicon Valley. But the plan is part of a much larger transformation.

programme.title: The Mysterious Rise of China's Desert AI Hubs
programme.desc: A Bloomberg investigation found China is building a small city of AI data centers in a remote desert and looking to buy 115,000 of Nvidia’s best chips to power them despite a US export ban.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk to NBA Hall of Famer Tracy McGrady to discuss how he became an NFL owner, why the ‘90s revolutionized basketball and returning to the NBA as an NBC analyst.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S4 - EP 6
programme.desc: FIFA's Jill Ellis on World Cup Demand. FIFA Chief Football Officer Jill Ellis discusses World Cup ticket prices, revenue expectations and the growth of the game.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: AJ Andrews on baseball’s momentum, softball’s growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Sixth Street’s Alan Waxman talks about taking a stake in the New England Patriots, international growth opportunities in the NBA and why a historic NWSL expansion fee paid off.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China’s spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Fake permits, undercover informants and millions of dollars. How a US government agency set out to prove suppliers to research labs were importing wild monkeys from Cambodia with false paperwork.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The award-winning series that sets out to uncover the truth behind some of the most powerful stories from around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 3
programme.desc: Rainbow Mountain offers tourists a picture-perfect view that has flooded social media feeds. But behind this viral beauty spot is the story of a community at war and cries for help ignored.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower. She trains with a Taekwondo blackbelt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with three-time Super Bowl champion Steve Young to discuss the challenges faced and lessons learned on his journey from the NFL to managing a $10 billion fund.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 51 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Today's Close-up

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring the Unknown World "The Jewel of the Mediterranean, Tunisia"
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world’s hidden secrets.

programme.title: NHK News 845

programme.title: News Watch 9 (B)
programme.desc: NHK's mainstay evening news program.

programme.title: An Unlikely Pair Hits the Road
programme.desc: Two people who live in "different worlds" ― one physically impaired and unimpaired ― and who have never met before, embark on a journey of three days and two nights. Will their world expand? This documentary provides an opportunity to think about diversity.

programme.title: Japan Genesis: Pilgrimage to the Land of the Gods 5min.

programme.desc: A series of drama with casts in the spotlight, for the end of your day.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: With colourful pile fabric and comfortable knits, Wakayama Prefecture is drawing global attention as a textile hub - we bring you striking images of its machines and the beat of its factories.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto, and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery at the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka - behold the sublime beauty of Mount Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.title: Magical Japanese

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Efforts to save children have evolved in a unique way that energises people who provide services - we introduce a splendid international example of such an initiative in Matsuyama in Ehime Prefecture.

programme.title: Hello! NHK World-Japan
programme.desc: We introduce the English-language versions of two "edutainment" programs for kids: The Wakey Show, with DJ Wakey and a cast of puppets, and I Love 'Mee', an animation exploring everyday questions.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Direct Talk

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programme.desc: Spear squid is immensely popular in squid-loving Japan - tag along with fishers in Hokkaido and savour some regional cuisine, fresh sushi, and a special take on a beloved Italian-inspired inky dish.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Big Boys Club

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 14
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 16
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2824
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 32
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin tracks down Shek Wai’s old love Chiu Lai, who tells him a mysterious guy visited Shek Wai’s home recently. Chiu-kwan decides to sue Yeung-tin with the aim of revoking the trust. Ko Sham slyly makes the top legal counsels in the city refuse to represent Chiu-kwan. Siu-chuen questions Ko Sham about this.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. programme.desc: This gripping drama centers on the looming threats of massive meteorological disasters and their impact on human lives. It follows the unwavering dedication of a Special Disaster Management team who armed with expertise and courage, risk everything on the front lines to save lives.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 32
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.
