programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin tracks down Shek Wai’s old love Chiu Lai, who tells him a mysterious guy visited Shek Wai’s home recently. Chiu-kwan decides to sue Yeung-tin with the aim of revoking the trust. Ko Sham slyly makes the top legal counsels in the city refuse to represent Chiu-kwan. Siu-chuen questions Ko Sham about this.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 8

programme.title: Their Wonderful Time - EP 1
programme.desc: When female game designer Song Ling Ling (Zhou Jie Qiong) unexpectedly becomes possessed by the NPC she had created, she finds herself in a comical cohabitation with ‘the client’, Xiao Ran (Ge Qiu Gu).

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen is unhappy about the prospect of Lam Ching becoming vice chairman, so she takes her to some road on the hill where she slaps and insults her. Family members react strongly to Yeung-tin’s decision to promote Lam Ching, and Wun-chau dissuades them.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 45
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Generation to Generation - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The series follows Cai Zhao (Bao Shangen), a calm and collected girl, and Mu Qingyan (Zhou Yiran), a decisive young master. While resolving historical conflicts together between different martial arts factions they also fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 13
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Faced with the unanimous opposition of the directors, Yeung-tin boldly puts forward a proposal. He threatens to resign if Lam Ching’s appointment is not approved. As soon as the meeting is concluded, Wai-leung and his chums covertly tell the media about the inside story of the Fongs’ mother and son legal battle, causing Fong International share price to go south.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2230
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 18
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 901-950) VVD Mandarin - EP 902
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 8
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 4
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy._x000D__x000D_ MUI’s uncle asks him to take care of his nightclub, which delights him.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 16
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 19
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 15
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 9
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 5
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy._x000D__x000D_ MUI’s uncle asks him to take care of his nightclub, which delights him.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 17
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 20
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 17
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 18
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 19
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 20
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: In this action fantasy movie based on the Chinese legend of the White Snake, a young herbalist falls in love with a thousand-year-old white snake disguised as a woman. When the white snake's true identity is revealed, a sorcerer goes to battle believing that in doing so, he is restoring balance and order between man and the supernatural.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: It's an erotic gore-fest starring Kao Fei who seeks vengeance against his wife's rapists and killers by soliciting the help of a demented magician. In return, he endures copulating dead bodies as his enemies perish in blood spurting and body exploding glory. It's one of Hong Kong goriest films ever made.

programme.title: Fight Back to School II
programme.desc: Following his demotion, officer Sing resigns from the police force and goes undercover at an international school to privately investigate a terrorist plot. There, he discovers bumbling detective Tat posing as a teacher. Forced into an alliance, they team up to confront the heavily armed criminals behind the plot in a chaotic showdown.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey1-Pandora's box
programme.desc: Joker, a carefree bandit leader, learns he is the reincarnation of the Monkey King. As demons and immortals close in, he is drawn into a chaotic, time-bending journey with the mystical Pandora's Box. Caught between past and present, he must choose between destiny and freedom.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter's company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover's death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Mahjong Heroes
programme.desc: A hero helps a young student deflect a cunning and malicious gambling tycoon who is out to take over the student's family business over a game of mahjong.

programme.title: Cherie
programme.desc: Cherie Chung plays the title character in this sexy romance as a fitness instructor who attracts the attentions of a wealthy businessman and a handsome photographer.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll's eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Sing is a rich man studying abroad, but is so spoiled that he can never concentrate on his studies but spends his time flirting with girls. One day, Sing gets blown up by a mobster when he hooks up with his mistress, Silvia. This arrogant prankster is resurrected instead as an unbeatable cyborg with unique skills, a real job and a new true love.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: After provoking the son of a local tyrant, young Wong Fei Hung is sent by his father to train under Drunken Master Beggar So. When his father uncovers the tyrant's plot to sell mines to the Japanese, he becomes a target for assassination. To save his father and stop the sale, Fei Hung must forge his own "Drunken Fist" style to defeat the killers.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: An illegitimate daughter of a businessman gets three wishes from a genie, Bo. However, Bo's magical power is far from perfect, leading to much hilarity in this charming fantasy comedy.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: This is based on the real-life story of Master Yu Jim Yuen who strives to run his academy in the 1960s, even as the opera culture is declining. Three young men, Sammo Hung, Jackie Chan and Yuen Biao, are determined to train under Master Yu and undergo extremely tough training before they become three of Hong Kong's biggest stars

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Let's Have a Baby
programme.desc: De Sheng and Wan Jun have been married for years, but are unable to conceive. Wan Jun decides to undergo artificial insemination in the States and finally gets pregnant. She meets her cousin from the States who stays temporarily in their house with them, and De Sheng begins to suspect that they are having an affair...

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Love on Delivery
programme.desc: A delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move "Invincible Wind and Fire Spin".

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation...

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Playboy Hong Kong Barber Happy Chan opens a fashionable new salon, right next to an old-fashioned Shanhainese barber shop. Its owner, Chuk, is furious at this development and starts a quarrel with Chan and his colleagues during the opening ceremony of his new venture Chuk's pretty daughter, Ying, is forced to keep the peace. Chan and his friends all attempt to woo Ying, but end up getting drunk and falling asleep in her bedroom.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: An aging fighter relives the mistakes of his violent past through a poor and streetwise kid, who severely injures his nemesis during a battle to win a girl's heart.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: King Kong comes to Hong Kong in THE MIGTHY PEKING MAN, a uniquely Shaw Brothers spin on the ageless theme of beauty and the beast. The beast, seven stories high and hailing from the Himalayas, makes his way to the jungles of India in the wake of a violent earthquake. The beauty is Russia starlet Evelyne Kraft, a sexy blonde Tarzanette who is the Mighty Peking Man's best friend.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Ivy Ling Po plays a young scholar who is manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter. After marrying, he soon discovers the reason for her hesitation. She is stricken with a contagious disease. But, with the power of true love, their romance prevails.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Heroes Of Sung stars one of the original kung fu ladies of the silver screen, Shih Szu, who plays swordswoman Meng Hung. She must work with Fan Tien-Fu, played by Lo Lieh to find and protect the royal seals of the Sung Dynasty. Shih's magnificent performance earned her the female hero role in another hit Dracula And The 7 Golden Vampires.

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: Mrs Xu is childless and watches a lonely little girl playing at the rear entrance from afar every day. She warmly nurtures the girl and even adopts her from her uncaring parent. The girl brings happiness to the Xu's until her long lost mother appears one day and to make her happy, Mrs Xu reluctantly lets the girl reunite with her mother.

programme.title: The Voyage of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung continues his incognito voyage to southern China. Accompanied by the minister and the imperial scholar, they have many amusing encounters in Yangzhou.

programme.title: Twin Blades Of Doom
programme.desc: A retired martial artist is forced to return with a vengeance after his family and friends are murdered by the evil Ghost Gang. He decides to challenge the gang's leader to a deadly duel so as to take revenge. Can he defeat the ruthless leader in the end?

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: The story revolves around three lay disciples of the Shaolin Temple: Fang Shi Yu, Hong Xi Guan, and Hu Hui Qian. Monk Jie instructs them in martial arts, but their frequent competitions with fellow disciple Wu Qing spark rivalries. The once serene Shaolin Temple is plunged into chaos, yet even the abbot cannot help but be amused by their antics.

programme.title: Six Assassins
programme.desc: Lord Li Ming is a feudal tyrant who oppresses the people, and even the Emperor who is his brother, cannot stop his evil act. Righteous swordsman Mu poses as Li Ming's guard to plan for his assassination. He arrests six assassins who have tried to kill Li Ming, before making them his allies in a secret plot to kill him and end the tyranny.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: This sword-filled thriller centres on The Black Tavern - an inn where the down and dirty meet to plot nefarious doings. A bunch of villains are lured to the inn by a rumour about a valuable treasure being hidden there. After all the backstabbing and killings, they realise that it is a trap created to wipe them out once and for all…

programme.title: Empress Wu
programme.desc: Wu Ze Tian is a beautiful and talented concubine of Emperor Tang at age 14. She becomes a nun after he died but has two sons with the new Emperor Tang Gao Zong. The Empress asks Wu to team up with her against Consort Xiao, but is set up and dethroned by Wu, who also kills her two sons. After the Emperor's death, Wu becomes the first woman Emperor.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Fan is cheated by her lover Tong to steal her master's Jade Dragon Sword. She is jailed in the Dragon Swamp as punishment and gave birth to a pair of twins - her daughter is raised by her master, while her son is taken by Tong. Twenty years later, the sword is stolen again and Fan's daughter goes seeking for it, meeting Fan's friend along the way.

programme.title: Let's Fall In Love
programme.desc: Da Yung, the son of a rich entrepreneur, meets Lian Lian, the niece of a kindergarten principal by chance. They fall into a misunderstanding on the first meeting, causing Da Yung to lose his wallet. Further misunderstanding occurs when he tries to get her to act as his fiancé so as to drive away two women whom he does not like…

programme.title: Mad Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Master Chen was an esteemed Monkey Kung Fu master, until he is framed and crippled by a ruthless villain and ends up becoming a wandering artiste. When Chen meets a young man, Little Monkey, on the streets, he decides to teach him all his monkey kung fu moves. Both men eventually team up to avenge Chen's past insult.

programme.title: The Comedy of Mismatches
programme.desc: Two pairs of lovers got mismatched accidentally. The man disguises as a woman for his sister's wedding ceremony, while his lover disguises as a man to marry another woman. After the marriage mismatches are revealed, the lovers and their families are taken to court, where Prefecture Chief Qiao manages to work out a happy ending.

programme.title: Notorious Eight
programme.desc: The young Chen Chi-chin (Liu Yung) loses heavily to experienced gambler Hu Kuan-ten (Lo Lieh). His father loses at cards and dies of shock. Chen appeals to his uncle who summons seven fellow professional gamblers to carry out vengeance. Much more than a gambling film, this is a thrilling melting pot of martial arts stars, extortion, illicit love, poker-face vengeance, and all sorts of edge-of-your-seat gambling duels.

programme.title: Moods Of Love
programme.desc: This Song Dynasty period piece about how far one would go for love (or lust) has two tales. The first involves a devilish magistrate who tries to tempt a Buddhist monk out of his self-professed celibacy by hiring a pretty prostitute. The second is the tragic tale of an exploited young girl who is forced to work in an unscrupulous couple's brothel.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: After a royal coup, two princes are separated, one raised in Shaolin as Dao Xing, the other as Wu Zi Tai under a minister. Years later, they meet at Shaolin while seeking the Yi Jin Jing, unaware they are brothers, as hidden identities and destiny unfold amid rising conflict and danger.

programme.title: Na Cha And The Seven Devils
programme.desc: While stealing one magical peach from a mystic tree in Heaven, Little Na Cha accidentally drops seven others on Earth, which transformed seven different animals into seven devils. Na Cha must hunt the devils down in ten days or his father will be punished by the King of Heaven. Can Na Cha complete his mission?

programme.title: The Bully
programme.desc: For lovers of the Shaw's sumptuous production and martial arts expertise, this action adventure in the "Jackie Chan style" is a special treat. A persecuted waiter turns to a "drunken master" for help when a restaurant customer turns out to be a kung-fu harbinger of doom!

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Skilled shadow Tai Chi boxer Ku Ting hides his skills by working as a construction worker. However, when the thugs assaulted his girlfriend, Ku Ting has no choice but to use his kung fu to show his enemies what it takes to keep justice in line.

programme.title: Love without End
programme.desc: Singer Qing Qing and architect Peng Nan are a devoted couple. Qing Qing sacrifices herself to help Peng Nan when his family is going through difficulties and is misunderstood by Peng Nan, leading to their break up. When Peng Nan learns the truth and decides to make up with Qing Qing, he finds out that she is suffering from a terminal illness.

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: An ambitious evil clan intends to rule the martial arts world. To achieve their goal, they must first steal a secret martial arts manuscript depicting how firearms can be produced. However, a supremely intelligent swordsman Shen Sheng Yi is protecting the manuscript and remains one step ahead of the evil clan.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: When the husband of a doctor, Tung is fatally wounded in an accident, he reveals to her about his affair with Blackie, who is impregnated with his baby. Despite the devastation of the betrayal and the eventual death of her husband, Tung is pressured by her mother-in-law into putting up with Blackie and offer $1M for her baby...

programme.title: Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: The Killer star Danny Lee plays the lead role of a guy who needs to become a hero. He lies, steals and cheats his way into operating a plush casino, but when he incurs the wrath of a female Japanese gang leader, all bets are off!

programme.title: Love without End
programme.desc: In this classic romantic melodrama, nightclub songstress Qing Qing falls for the handsome Peng Nan. However, the two go through an emotional roller coaster of misunderstandings, separations and mutual torment. When the two finally fall back into love, Qing Qing receives a shocking revelation that brings the story to its inevitable sad ending.

programme.title: Iron Bodyguard
programme.desc: Wang Wu, the head of a security firm Iron Bodyguard, meets a scholar who is a member of the Reformists, a group of scholars pressing for social reform in China at the end of the Qing dynasty. The Emperor actually supports such reforms but not the Empress Dowager. She orders the Reformists to be arrested and Wang Wu gets drawn into the politics.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing from the first movie, Tang Qi ends her career as a nightclub singer and starts searching battle-scarred China for her lover Chang, who is now entangled with Japanese invaders, communist insurgents, and a warlord's beautiful daughter.

programme.title: The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: The Yu family and the Green Dragon clan became enemies when the Yu daughter killed the clan head's son, who was a rapist and murderer. The Green Dragon leader wounds the head of the Yu family with his flying daggers, and a wandering swordsman saves the family using his own flying dagger skills. However, his allegiances and motives are unclear.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: This is a coming-of-age tale depicting the lower class Hong Kong troubled youths in the 1960s and the societal issues that they face. Wang Chung is a hotheaded and rebellious teen who is tempted by the dark side, and have to unfortunately pay a huge price for it.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 900
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Blue Moment - EP 4
programme.desc: This gripping drama centers on the looming threats of massive meteorological disasters and their impact on human lives. It follows the unwavering dedication of a Special Disaster Management team who armed with expertise and courage, risk everything on the front lines to save lives.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 32
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2228
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin tracks down Shek Wai’s old love Chiu Lai, who tells him a mysterious guy visited Shek Wai’s home recently. Chiu-kwan decides to sue Yeung-tin with the aim of revoking the trust. Ko Sham slyly makes the top legal counsels in the city refuse to represent Chiu-kwan. Siu-chuen questions Ko Sham about this.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2228
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 16
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Their Wonderful Time - EP 1
programme.desc: When female game designer Song Ling Ling (Zhou Jie Qiong) unexpectedly becomes possessed by the NPC she had created, she finds herself in a comical cohabitation with ‘the client’, Xiao Ran (Ge Qiu Gu).

programme.title: Call Of Destiny - EP 9
programme.desc: Fang Ri Jin (Carlos Chan) unexpectedly connects with Xing Ke Lan (Hera Chan), who is in a future timeline and trapped in a crisis. Is fate already predetermined? Will Ri Jin choose to compromise, or will he take a leap of faith to rewrite destiny?

programme.title: Generation to Generation - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The series follows Cai Zhao (Bao Shangen), a calm and collected girl, and Mu Qingyan (Zhou Yiran), a decisive young master. While resolving historical conflicts together between different martial arts factions they also fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen is unhappy about the prospect of Lam Ching becoming vice chairman, so she takes her to some road on the hill where she slaps and insults her. Family members react strongly to Yeung-tin’s decision to promote Lam Ching, and Wun-chau dissuades them.
